task_name: Add New AI Image Provider to Vercel AI SDK

plan_metrics.plan_content:
Here's my implementation plan for the `@ai-sdk/pixelart` provider. I've done a thorough exploration of the codebase and modeled everything after `packages/luma/` — the best minimal image-only provider reference.

**Summary of what will be created in `packages/pixelart/`:**

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `package.json` | Package config (`@ai-sdk/pixelart`), CJS+ESM exports, deps on `@ai-sdk/provider` + `@ai-sdk/provider-utils` |
| `tsconfig.json` + `tsconfig.build.json` | TypeScript project config extending `@vercel/ai-tsconfig` |
| `tsup.config.ts` | Build config generating CJS+ESM+types |
| `src/version.ts` | Build-time version injection |
| `src/pixelart-image-settings.ts` | `PixelArtImageModelId` type + `PixelArtImageSettings` interface (`size`, `style`, `pixelDensity`) |
| `src/pixelart-image-model.ts` | `PixelArtImageModel implements ImageModelV3` — `doGenerate()`, Zod schemas, `parseProviderOptions` |
| `src/pixelart-provider.ts` | `createPixelArt()` factory, `PixelArtProvider` interface extending `ProviderV3`, throws `NoSuchModelError` for language/embedding models |
| `src/index.ts` | Public exports: `createPixelArt`, `pixelart`, types |

**Key implementation details:**
- Uses `https://api.pixelart.ai/v1` as base URL, `PIXELART_API_KEY` env var
- `doGenerate()` POSTs to `/images/generations`, returns base64 images (`b64_json`)
- Warns on unsupported `aspectRatio`, `seed`, `files`, and `mask`
- Provider options (`style`, `pixelDensity`, `size`) extracted via `parseProviderOptions` under the `"pixelart"` key
- `maxImagesPerCall = 4`
- No existing files are modified

Shall I proceed with implementation?
